name: Legendary Resistance (2/Day)
description: Twice per day, if the creature fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

name: Lair Action: Tremor
description: On initiative count 20 (losing ties), the creature can cause the ground in a 30-foot radius to shudder. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC {dc} Dexterity saving throw or fall prone.

name: Lair Action: Crushing Dark
description: On initiative count 20 (losing ties), the creature can snuff all nonmagical light sources within 60 feet of itself. The area is plunged into darkness that cannot be dispelled except by a spell of 2nd level or higher.

name: Lair Action: Dire Summons
description: On initiative count 20 (losing ties), the creature calls out to lesser servants. A group of minor creatures appropriate to its theme manifests within 30 feet. These creatures act on initiative count 10 and fight until destroyed or the encounter ends.

name: Legendary Action: Swift Advance
description: The creature can take 3 legendary actions per round, choosing from the options listed. Only one option can be used at a time and only at the end of another creature's turn. The creature regains spent legendary actions at the start of its turn. Move (Costs 1 Action): The creature moves up to its speed. Attack (Costs 2 Actions): The creature makes one attack.

name: Legendary Action: Wail of the Forsaken
description: As a legendary action, the creature emits a mournful wail. Each creature within 30 feet that can hear it must succeed on a DC {dc} Wisdom saving throw or become frightened until the end of its next turn.

name: Legendary Healing: Drain the Fallen
description: When a creature within 30 feet is reduced to 0 hit points, the creature regains 20 hit points as it feeds on the departing life energy.

name: Legendary Action: Mind Shatter
description: As a legendary action (costs 2), the creature targets one creature it can see within 60 feet. That creature must succeed on a DC {dc} Intelligence saving throw or take 4d6 psychic damage and be stunned until the end of its next turn.

name: Legendary Action: Vanishing Step
description: As a legendary action, the creature turns invisible until the start of its next turn or until it makes an attack. While invisible, it can move up to half its movement speed.

name: Legendary Action: Apex Strike
description: As a legendary action (costs 2 actions), the creature makes one attack with advantage. On a hit, the attack deals an additional 2d8 damage and the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

name: Legendary Resilience: Breath Recharge
description: At the start of each of its turns, the creature rolls a d6. On a 5 or 6, its breath weapon or primary area attack recharges immediately. When the creature uses a recharge ability, it roars or vents energy, imposing disadvantage on the next attack made against it until the start of its next turn.

name: Lair Action: Psychic Tremor
description: On initiative count 20 (losing ties), the creature floods the area with alien thought. Each creature within 60 feet must succeed on a DC {dc} Wisdom saving throw or take 2d6 psychic damage and be unable to use their reaction until the start of their next turn.

name: Legendary Resilience: Self-Repair
description: At the start of its turn, if the creature is below half its maximum hit points, it regains 10 hit points. This ability ceases if the creature takes a critical hit from an adamantine weapon or similar anti-construct effect.

name: Lair Action: Scorched Earth
description: On initiative count 20 (losing ties), the creature causes flames or superheated air to burst from the ground in a 20-foot radius. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC {dc} Dexterity saving throw or take 2d6 fire damage. The area becomes difficult terrain until the start of initiative count 20 on the next round.

name: Legendary Action: Cursed Strike
description: As a legendary action (costs 2 actions), the creature makes one melee or ranged attack. On a hit, in addition to normal damage, the target is cursed. The cursed creature has disadvantage on saving throws until it is targeted by a remove curse spell or similar effect.
